description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and publish, using the global image mcr.microsoft.com/powershell:7.1.3-ubuntu-20.04 and a before_script that makes all directories executable via `find ./ -type d -execdir chmod u+x {} +`. In the test stage add a test job that runs the PowerShell command `pwsh -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -NoLogo -NonInteractive -File ./Deploy/RunTest.ps1 -MTA -ErrorActionPreference Stop`. In the publish stage add a publish job that runs only on tag pipelines, depends on the test job, switches to the image mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:3.1, uses a service container `mcr.microsoft.com/powershell:7.1.3-ubuntu-20.04` aliased as pwsh, and executes `pwsh -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -NoLogo -NonInteractive -File ./Deploy/RunPublish.ps1 -MTA -ErrorActionPreference Stop`. The publish job defines an environment named publish with URL https://www.powershellgallery.com/WakeUpAzureWebApp, and publishes the entire repository as an artifact (paths ./) that expires after one week and is always uploaded. Set CI variables CI_DEBUG_TRACE false, ErrorActionPreference stop, and GIT_SSL_NO_VERIFY true.
